title: Miskolc Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Miskolc with a Z-Score of +3.20. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Miskolc has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10, indicating extremely high temperatures. 
 The temperature anomaly is significant, with a Z-Score of +3.20, which is far above the average. 
 The low humidity of 21% and moderate wind of 17.6 km/h are exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
